global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on product promotion and brand visibility.
global.main_message: Promoting a new collection with a special price offer.

elements.label: Top background area
elements.description: A light gray rectangular area at the top of the ad, providing a neutral backdrop.

elements.label: LuxShelf brand name
elements.description: Bold, modern text reading 'LuxShelf' in black, positioned prominently at the top left.

elements.label: Product display area
elements.description: A blank rectangular area in the center, suggesting a placeholder for product images.

elements.label: Small circular element
elements.description: A small circular shape in the center, possibly representing a product or decorative element.

elements.label: Another circular element
elements.description: Another small circular shape, similar to the previous one, positioned slightly below.

elements.label: Main promotional text
elements.description: Large, bold text stating 'New collection drop Shop bestsellers now' in black, centered in the lower part of the ad.
elements.text_content: New collection drop Shop bestsellers now $4.99 Try for free

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small rectangular badge with the word 'SALE' in white text on a bright background, positioned at the top right.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A prominent '$4.99' displayed in bold black text, located just below the main promotional text.

embedding_texts.global_text: LuxShelf, unknown, banner, minimalist with bold typography, promoting a new collection.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top left, the product display is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
